modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to connect new wifi-enabled devices to USD wireless network

full_description_text:  
Our department has recently acquired a new type of device that is equipped with wifi capabilities, specifically an Automated External Defibrillator (AED). We are seeking guidance on the process required to connect these non-standard devices to the USD wireless network. This connection is essential for ensuring the device can function effectively within our operational environment.
